label: Denmark (DK1)
data_quality: demand: 6 half-hours missing in 3 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 13 Jun 11:00→13 Jun 11:30; 01 Jul 12:00→01 Jul 12:30; 01 Jul 20:00→01 Jul 20:30

solar: 54 half-hours missing in 7 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30; 18 Jun 20:30→19 Jun 02:00; 19 Jun 20:30→20 Jun 01:30 (+4 more)
BIOMASS: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30
CCGT: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30
COAL: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30
OIL: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30
OTHER: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30
WIND: 1 half-hours missing in 1 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 16 Jun 03:30→16 Jun 03:30

price.name: DK_1 day-ahead auction price
price.notes: True auction price — unlike GB's MID proxy. Currency is EUR, not GBP.

generation_by_fuel.name: DK_1 actual generation per production type
generation_by_fuel.notes: Fossil Gas mapped to CCGT (ENTSO-E does not split CCGT/OCGT); Wind On+Offshore summed into WIND — coverage differs from Elexon's transmission-only metering. See plan/04-europe-extension.md.
